title: Record earlier absolute trigger, plan refresh, and approval/spark density

fixtureActions.content:
# Absolute180 Approval Spark Contract

## Absolute 180k
large-window absolute soft trigger defaults to 180k tokens so long sessions compact earlier before attention rot

## Plan refresh 4
non-ultra plan-mode full reminder refresh every 4 assistant turns

## Approval pulse
approval panel selected pointers pulse under ambient effects; step summaries use denser 6-cell spark bars

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/plan-mode/approval/step-summary vitest
